title: iguanura diffusa
intro: Iguanura diffusa, also known as the rattan palm or wild rattan, is a type of climbing palm tree native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Iguanura diffusa has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Iguanura diffusa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made from the plant's roots, stems, and leaves.
